name: EmulationStation gamelist.xml

paths.media_relative_to: system rom folder or frontend media folders

ai_operations: add or update manual/image paths after user-approved scraping
filter by metadata fields such as developer/publisher/genre/region when present
notes: Used by RetroBat, Batocera, Recalbox, RetroPie, and ES-DE variants with frontend-specific path details.
For a task like ensuring all 3DO games have screenshots and descriptions, inspect every game node for desc and image/thumbnail fields and verify referenced media exists.
